economic_notes: Nation has investments in Hatchet Lake Development LP (99.99%), Waterfound Development LP (33.33%), Waterfound Development Corp (33.33%), and Hatchet Lake Denesuline FN Economic Development Corporation (100%). Hatchet Lake Development LP operates retail and other businesses with total revenues of ~$13M.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget information required by PSAS. Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Nation is located in Wollaston Lake, Saskatchewan. Large deferred revenue balance of $8.3M primarily from ISC capital project funding (seasonal road $6M, subdivision $1.08M, solid waste $0.99M). Statements are restated for 2019 comparative figures. GBEs include Hatchet Lake Development LP, Waterfound Development LP, Waterfound Development Corp, and HLFN Economic Development Corp. osr calculated as total revenue minus all identified government transfers (ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + PAGC + First Nations Trust + Athabasca Dene Education Corp + Northern Lights School Division + Athabasca Denesuline Child & Family Services); result is negative due to deferred revenue netting. annual_debt_service includes long-term debt repayments of $390,714 and CMHC mortgage repayments of $289,817. Restricted cash includes capital projects ($7,910,331) and CMHC reserve ($174,634) and trust funds ($22,949). Remuneration schedule not provided in extracted text.
